name: Columbus A/S
summary: Columbus A/S, an IT services and consulting company, offers digital solutions for the manufacturing, food, and retail and distribution industries in Eastern and Western Europe, and North America. It provides application management, business and application integration, cloud ERP, cloud and infrastructure services, compliance and business continuity, data and analytics, and digital commerce solutions; customer relationship management, field service automation, and in-store experience services; and strategy and change solutions. The company also offers various solutions for beverage and process; rental, lease, and equipment; and fashion industries. Columbus A/S was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Ballerup, Denmark.
